sources.description: NOAA ETOPO 2022 60 arc-second global bedrock relief GeoTIFF. Includes land topography and ocean bathymetry.
sources.citation: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information. 2022: ETOPO 2022 15 Arc-Second Global Relief Model. NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information. https://doi.org/10.25921/fd45-gt74

sources.description: ESA CCI/C3S 2020 global land-cover class map at 300 m resolution, mirrored as a Cloud Optimized GeoTIFF by NatCap.
sources.license: ESA CCI / Copernicus C3S open land-cover product; keep upstream citation with derived artifacts.
sources.citation: ESA Climate Change Initiative Land Cover / Copernicus Climate Change Service, global annual land-cover maps at 300 m, v2.1.1.
